subject: simple transformation of a star file
body:
Is there a tool to shift origins of a species by a specified vector (no 
rotation, just a shift) within Warp/M tools? If yes, Is it possible to 
combine multiple species into one and filter for duplicates?

All these problems could be solved if I could export M star file back to 
Relion star file. But it seems that there is no easy way back.
